title: National Initial Disability Claims by Title, FY2001–FY2018
description: Long-format (tidy) national time series of initial disability claim counts by program title — SSDI (Title II), SSI (Title XVI), concurrent, and total — by federal fiscal year. Extracted from the SSA source workbook into a tidy long format.

columns.name: rows[].year
columns.description: Federal fiscal year (2001–2018 in the actual data).

notes: Authoritative: derived 1:1 from initial-claims-by-title-fy2001-2019.source.xlsx into tidy long format. FILENAME-LABEL DISCREPANCY: the file name says fy2001-2019 but the actual rows only run FY2001–FY2018 (no FY2019 rows present); temporal_coverage reflects the real data range. Top-level keys: schema='long', metric_family='initial_claims_by_title', source_file, extracted_at (2026-05-08), rows (no fy_range key). All rows are scope='national'. Column dot-paths denote fields of each rows[] object. Source URL is SSA's canonical disability-data page; exact deep link to the source workbook not recorded in the file.
